tests.goal: Ensure every Phase6 AgentEval task with problem_slug has a fixture problem workspace.

Contract: nightly real-agent entrypoints support provider/profile resolver path plus legacy command override.
Ensure mentor-keyword tasks + fixtures cite curated reference IDs (no random URLs in task.yaml).
Smoke-test: Phase6 agent-eval runner can materialize a single workspace.

Ensure AgentEval scenarios cover INTERLEAVING/REGRESSION/PRESSURE taxonomy.
E2E smoke: run_scenario (run mode) + grade_scenario using the deterministic dummy agent.
